structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating loop 0-50% – discharge temperature reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When heating-loop output is 0% to 50%, reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to maximum MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint, while active airflow setpoint is heating minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating and heating-loop output between 0% and 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: reset discharge temperature setpoint from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint; active airflow setpoint is heating minimum endpoint
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: From 0 % to 50%, the heating-loop output shall reset the discharge temperature setpoint from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. The active airflow setpoint shall be the heating minimum endpoint.

evidence_quote: 5.6.5.3. When the Zone State  is heating , the Heating Loop  shall maintain space  temperature at the heating
